final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: aerial cinematic still, drone photography
Primary request: aerial long-exposure shot of a modern international metropolis core business district at night with cyberpunk color grading
Scene/backdrop: dense urban skyline with countless skyscrapers, elevated highways with light trails, harbor with giant cruise ships docked, neon billboards illuminating the sky
Subject: iconic supertall skyscraper at center with sweeping searchlight beams cutting through night sky
Style/medium: drone aerial photography, long exposure, cinematic editorial
Composition/framing: high-angle bird's-eye view, wide establishing shot capturing entire cityscape
Lighting/mood: night cityscape with dramatic high contrast, searchlight beams piercing darkness, neon glow reflecting off glass facades, energetic and futuristic atmosphere
Color palette: cyberpunk palette dominated by deep blues and purples, magenta and cyan neon accents, warm red and white light trails from traffic
Materials/textures: reflective glass curtain walls, smooth asphalt highways, metallic cruise ship hulls, glowing LED billboard surfaces
Constraints: keep the iconic supertall building as central focal point, preserve long-exposure light trails, maintain cyberpunk blue-purple dominant tones
Avoid: daytime lighting, washed-out colors, low contrast, watermark, oversaturated unnatural skin tones
